summary: Designer integration with semantic extraction pipeline validated. Field selection, ACORD binding panel, checkbox detection, field type classification, and mapping preview all connected.

validations.mechanism: selectField() in designerStore -> selectedIds state -> useSelectedField() hook -> PropertiesPanel renders metadata
validations.verified_by: Browser snapshot confirms properties panel populates with Field Basics, ACORD Mapping sections on click

validations.mechanism: initializeMappings() called after mapFields response -> mappingStore.mappings[blockId] -> useSelectedFieldMapping() -> DesignerBindingsPanel renders candidates
validations.bug_fixed: chooseCandidate(extractionBlockId, acordCode) wired to candidate onClick — was calling non-existent updateMapping()

validations.mechanism: buildBlocksFromPages() detects \u2610/\u2611/\u2612 and [] patterns -> type: 'checkbox' -> inferFieldType() returns 'checkbox' -> buildTypedFieldPreview() creates 20x20 checkbox field
validations.pipeline: DI OCR -> buildBlocksFromPages -> type=checkbox -> mapFields -> checkbox FieldMapping -> PdfImportModal -> CheckboxField on canvas

validations.mechanism: inferSemanticFields() classifies by regex patterns. Results in fieldTypes:{blockId: SemanticFieldType} returned from extractDocument and used by buildTypedFieldPreview() in PdfImportModal
MappingPanel component reads from useSelectedFieldMapping() which computes chosenCandidate from mappingStore decision graph. Confidence thresholds: accepted >= 0.8, review >= 0.6, rejected < 0.45
FieldRenderer.tsx: green border (>80%), orange (60-80%), red (<60%) based on metadata.confidence. Confidence badge displayed in bottom-right of each field box.

designer_import_flow.step1: extractText endpoint -> PageExtraction[] with OCR lines
designer_import_flow.step2: buildBlocksFromPages equivalent in PdfImportModal -> ExtractedBlock[] with DPI scaling
designer_import_flow.step3: mapFields endpoint -> FieldMapping[] with ACORD candidates (Wave 8 pipeline)
designer_import_flow.step5: setDraftCanvasFields() -> user review in draft mode
designer_import_flow.step6: commitDraftCanvasFields() -> addField() for each accepted field
designer_import_flow.step8: linkFieldToMapping() -> each canvas field linked to extraction block
